name: ai-healthcare-test-automation
description: AI-powered end-to-end test automation for healthcare patient-portal workflows, with Cypress + Playwright. Features self-healing locators, AI-assisted authoring, visual & accessibility AI checks, synthetic test-data generation, and security testing.

scripts.pretest: node -e "console.log('Start the mock app with: npm run mock')"
scripts.e2e: start-server-and-test mock http://127.0.0.1:4300 "playwright test && cypress run"
scripts.ai:author: node --experimental-strip-types shared/ai/nl-to-steps.ts
